name: Chocolate Banana Snack Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease and flour a square pan measuring 8" x 8" x 2".
3. In a small mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add water, oil, vinegar, and vanilla extract. Stir until smooth.
5. Fold in mashed ripe banana. Beat until well combined.
6. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
7. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the top.
8. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until a wooden toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
10. Cut into squares.
